topic: My suitcase in the closet is packed for a trip I never planned, and it repacks itself.
title: My Suitcase Packs Itself For A Trip | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My closet suitcase is packed for a trip I never planned, and it keeps repacking.
scenes.image_prompt: A packed suitcase open on a closet floor, folded clothes inside, dim wardrobe light, deep shadow, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have not traveled in years.
scenes.image_prompt: A dusty closet with an old suitcase tucked in the corner, low light, cobwebs, muted color, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The case had sat empty since I moved in.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty open suitcase on a bedroom floor, lid raised, dim grey light, shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One day it was full of clothes that fit me.
scenes.image_prompt: A suitcase neatly packed with folded shirts, soft side light, deep shadow inside, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
An unfamiliar folded jacket held up in dim light over a suitcase, low light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A train ticket lay on top, dated this Friday.
scenes.image_prompt: A paper train ticket resting on folded clothes inside a suitcase, dim lamp light, grainy texture, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I emptied the case and locked the closet.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty suitcase beside a closed closet door, key in the lock, dim hallway light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning it was packed again, the ticket reprinted.
scenes.image_prompt: A repacked suitcase with a fresh ticket on top, dim closet light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each ticket moved a day closer, to a place I did not know.
scenes.image_prompt: Several train tickets fanned out on a dark floor, faint print, harsh side light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night the case sat by my front door, ready.
scenes.image_prompt: A packed suitcase standing upright beside a front door, coat hung above it, dim light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The ticket now read tonight, and bore my name.
scenes.image_prompt: A close train ticket with a printed name on a dark table, dim lamp glow, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The departure platform listed is the cemetery on the hill.
scenes.image_prompt: A foggy hilltop cemetery gate at dusk seen down a path, dim grey light, bare trees, vertical 9:16 framing
